response.justification: The candidate is a strong senior generalist with impressive full-stack, DLang, and Node.js/TypeScript experience, but the role's core mandatory requirements are not met. His hands-on C++ experience is limited to a short stint at National Instruments (~7 months, 2014-2015) and a thesis project, far short of the required 5-10 years on Windows. There is no SQL Server or Oracle experience listed (MySQL/MongoDB only), and no Fixed Income, capital markets, or investment banking domain exposure beyond a brief period at a retail-investment startup (RIDE Capital) that does not match the fixed-income systems focus.
strengths: Deep overall engineering experience (15+ years) with strong craftsmanship practices (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development)
Low-latency, high-throughput systems experience (millions of requests/sec at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic)
Excellent communication skills evidenced by workshops, conference talks, and teaching
concerns: C++ experience is minimal and dated (~7 months professional use, ended 2015), versus 5-10 years required
No SQL Server or Oracle experience; database background is MySQL/MongoDB
No Fixed Income, capital markets, or investment banking domain expertise

key_factors.factor: Missing capital markets / fixed income domain
Strong general engineering and performance systems background
